presentation: I am a developer specialized in Unreal Engine with a solid foundation in C++,
dedicated to creating engaging gaming experiences.
My approach covers the entire development cycle: from creative ideation to final publication.
I combine clean and maintainable code architecture with a constant pursuit of optimization,
bridging the gap between artistic vision and technical excellence.
Whether it's exploring ancient ruins or implementing complex AI systems,
my goal is to transform great ideas into solid, high-performance products.
hero.image_desc: Fabio Pittaccio (me) during a trip to Villa Gregoriana (Tivoli, Rome)

item1.title: UE5 Specialist
item1.desc: I develop immersive experiences using the latest Unreal Engine 5 technologies, from Blueprint to C++

item2.title: Cross-Platform
item2.desc: Consolidated experience in publishing and optimizing titles for PC and Android devices

item3.title: Full-Cycle Dev
item3.desc: Complete project management: from initial concept to publication

ruins.name: Ruins' Rhapsody
desc: A dynamic adventure inspired by pillars like Tomb Raider.
Play as an archaeologist searching for a mythical rune, amid environmental puzzles, vertical exploration
and intense combat in ancient ruins.
The project highlights the management of complex movement systems and a cinematic atmosphere

goblin.name: Goblin Jr. Adventure
desc: A colorful and vibrant platformer set in stylized cubic worlds.
Designed with a focus on accessibility and immediate fun,
the game challenges players to guide a small goblin through traps and secrets.
An example of clean game design and visual optimization for a smooth and engaging gaming experience.

zombie.name: Zombie Siege Chronicles
desc: Developed for the 2024 Rookie Awards, this isometric tower defense game takes survival
Defend your base from relentless hordes of undead using special structures, barriers, and upgradeable turrets.
The project demonstrates the ability to handle dynamic events and enemy AI with unique abilities in UE5.
